title: From Inheritance to Saturation: Disentangling the Evolution of Visual Redundancy for Architecture-Aware MLLM Inference Acceleration
comment: 16 pages, 14 figures, plus appendix, accepted at ACL 2026
summary: High-resolution Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) face prohibitive computational costs during inference due to the explosion of visual tokens. Existing acceleration strategies, such as token pruning or layer sparsity, suffer from severe "backbone dependency", performing well on Vicuna or Mistral architectures (e.g., LLaVA) but causing significant performance degradation when transferred to architectures like Qwen. To address this, we leverage truncated matrix entropy to uncover a universal three-stage inference lifecycle, decoupling visual redundancy into universal Intrinsic Visual Redundancy (IVR) and architecture-dependent Secondary Saturation Redundancy (SSR). Guided by this insight, we propose HalfV, a framework that first mitigates IVR via a unified pruning strategy and then adaptively handles SSR based on its specific manifestation. Experiments demonstrate that HalfV achieves superior efficiency-performance trade-offs across diverse backbones. Notably, on Qwen25-VL, it retains 96.8\% performance at a 4.1$\times$ FLOPs speedup, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/civilizwa/HalfV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HalfV框架，通过解耦视觉冗余为通用内在视觉冗余和架构依赖的二次饱和冗余，实现了高分辨率多模态大语言模型的高效推理，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率多模态大语言模型面临视觉令牌爆炸导致推理计算成本过高的问题，现有加速策略存在严重的"骨干网络依赖性"，在不同架构间迁移时性能下降显著，需要一种通用且高效的加速方法。
AI.method: 本文利用截断矩阵熵揭示了三阶段推理生命周期，将视觉冗余解耦为通用内在视觉冗余和架构依赖的二次饱和冗余，提出了HalfV框架，首先通过统一剪枝策略缓解内在冗余，然后根据具体表现自适应处理二次冗余。
AI.result: 实验表明HalfV在不同骨干网络上实现了优越的效率-性能权衡，在Qwen25-VL上以4.1倍FLOPs加速保持了96.8%的性能，显著优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态大语言模型推理中的冗余结构规律，提出的解耦冗余分析方法为跨架构高效加速提供了通用框架，推动了高分辨率多模态模型的实际部署应用。

title: Topology-Aware Layer Pruning for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning, while recent extensions that incorporate visual inputs enable them to process multimodal information. Despite these advances, Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) incur substantial computational and memory costs, hindering deployment in resource-constrained scenarios. Existing layer pruning methods typically rely on local similarity metrics or static proxy signals, failing to capture the global and dynamic evolution of representations across model depth, which often leads to the removal of transition-critical layers. To address this limitation, we propose a topology-aware layer pruning framework for LVLMs. Specifically, we represent layer wise hidden states as point clouds and models their evolution using \textit{simplicial complexes}. By leveraging \textit{zigzag persistent homology}, we quantify inter-layer topological consistency and enable adaptive pruning that preserves critical representational transitions. Extensive experiments on diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing pruning methods across a wide range of sparsity ratios. Our code is available at https://github.com/zpc456/TopoVLM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）的拓扑感知层剪枝框架，通过将隐藏状态表示为点云并利用持续同调量化层间拓扑一致性，实现了在保持关键表示转换的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）存在显著的计算和内存开销，限制了其在资源受限场景下的部署。现有的层剪枝方法通常依赖局部相似性度量或静态代理信号，无法捕捉表示在模型深度上的全局动态演化，导致经常移除对表示转换至关重要的层。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种拓扑感知的层剪枝框架，将层间隐藏状态表示为点云，并使用单纯复形对表示演化进行建模。通过利用zigzag持续同调技术量化层间拓扑一致性，实现了自适应剪枝，能够有效保留关键的表示转换层。
AI.result: 在多种多模态基准测试上的广泛实验表明，所提出的框架在广泛的稀疏度范围内始终优于现有的剪枝方法，显著降低了LVLMs的计算成本同时保持了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了拓扑方法在模型压缩中的有效性，为资源受限环境下部署大型多模态模型提供了新思路。通过捕捉表示演化的全局动态特性，该方法能够更智能地识别和保留对模型功能至关重要的层。

title: Penny Wise, Pixel Foolish: Bypassing Price Constraints in Multimodal Agents via Visual Adversarial Perturbations
summary: The rapid proliferation of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has enabled mobile agents to execute high-stakes financial transactions, but their adversarial robustness remains underexplored. We identify Visual Dominance Hallucination (VDH), where imperceptible visual cues can override textual price evidence in screenshot-based, price-constrained settings and lead agents to irrational decisions. We propose PriceBlind, a stealthy white-box adversarial attack framework for controlled screenshot-based evaluation. PriceBlind exploits the modality gap in CLIP-based encoders via a Semantic-Decoupling Loss that aligns the image embedding with low-cost, value-associated anchors while preserving pixel-level fidelity. On E-ShopBench, PriceBlind achieves around 80% ASR in white-box evaluation; under a simplified single-turn coordinate-selection protocol, Ensemble-DI-FGSM transfers with roughly 35-41% ASR across GPT-4o, Gemini-1.5-Pro, and Claude-3.5-Sonnet. We also show that robust encoders and Verify-then-Act defenses reduce ASR substantially, though with some clean-accuracy trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了PriceBlind，一种针对多模态大语言模型在金融交易场景中的对抗攻击框架，揭示了视觉主导幻觉现象，即不可察觉的视觉线索会覆盖文本价格证据，导致智能体做出非理性决策。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型在金融交易等高风险场景中的广泛应用，其对抗鲁棒性尚未得到充分探索。本文旨在解决视觉主导幻觉问题，即不可察觉的视觉线索会覆盖截图场景中的文本价格证据，导致智能体做出非理性决策。
AI.method: 本文提出了PriceBlind，一种针对受控截图场景的隐蔽白盒对抗攻击框架。该方法利用CLIP编码器中的模态间隙，通过语义解耦损失将图像嵌入与低成本价值关联锚点对齐，同时保持像素级保真度。攻击框架包括白盒评估和基于集成DI-FGSM的单轮坐标选择协议进行迁移攻击。
AI.result: 在E-ShopBench基准测试中，PriceBlind在白盒评估中实现了约80%的攻击成功率。在简化的单轮坐标选择协议下，集成DI-FGSM方法在GPT-4o、Gemini-1.5-Pro和Claude-3.5-Sonnet等模型上实现了约35-41%的迁移攻击成功率。实验还表明，鲁棒编码器和Verify-then-Act防御策略能显著降低攻击成功率，但会带来一定的清洁准确率折衷。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态大语言模型在金融交易场景中的严重安全漏洞，即视觉主导幻觉现象。研究结果表明，当前模型容易受到基于模态间隙的对抗攻击，需要开发更鲁棒的编码器和防御机制。这项工作为多模态智能体的安全评估提供了重要基准，并强调了在部署高风险应用前进行对抗鲁棒性测试的必要性。

title: Reducing Peak Memory Usage for Modern Multimodal Large Language Model Pipelines
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding and generating responses from diverse visual inputs, including high-resolution images and long video sequences. As these models scale to richer visual representations, inference increasingly relies on storing large numbers of vision tokens in the key-value (KV) cache, making memory consumption a central bottleneck. Existing methods address this issue by identifying redundancy in vision tokens and compressing the cache, but such compression is typically applied only after all inputs are processed, resulting in high peak memory usage during the prefill stage. In this work, we show that MLLMs exhibit inherent structural regularities and representational redundancy that can be exploited to control memory growth throughout inference. Based on this insight, we propose a sequential input-compression mechanism that enforces a fixed memory budget by performing structure-aware key-value cache compression during the prefill process. This approach substantially reduces peak memory usage while maintaining generative performance with only minimal degradation, enabling more practical and memory-efficient multimodal inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种顺序输入压缩机制，通过在多模态大语言模型推理过程中执行结构感知的键值缓存压缩，在保持生成性能的同时显著降低峰值内存使用，实现了更实用的内存高效多模态推理。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型扩展到更丰富的视觉表示，推理过程需要在键值缓存中存储大量视觉令牌，导致内存消耗成为核心瓶颈。现有方法通常在处理完所有输入后才进行缓存压缩，导致预填充阶段出现高峰值内存使用，这限制了模型的实际部署效率。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种顺序输入压缩机制，通过在多模态大语言模型的推理过程中执行结构感知的键值缓存压缩。该方法利用MLLMs固有的结构规律性和表示冗余性，在预填充过程中强制执行固定的内存预算，从而在整个推理过程中控制内存增长。
AI.result: 该方法显著降低了峰值内存使用，同时仅以最小的性能退化保持了生成性能。实验结果表明，这种结构感知的压缩方法能够实现更实用的内存高效多模态推理，解决了现有方法在预填充阶段内存消耗过高的问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明多模态大语言模型具有可利用的结构规律性和表示冗余性，可以在整个推理过程中控制内存增长。顺序输入压缩机制为内存受限环境下的多模态模型部署提供了有效解决方案，平衡了内存效率与模型性能之间的关系。

title: Multimodal Claim Extraction for Fact-Checking
summary: Automated Fact-Checking (AFC) relies on claim extraction as a first step, yet existing methods largely overlook the multimodal nature of today's misinformation. Social media posts often combine short, informal text with images such as memes, screenshots, and photos, creating challenges that differ from both text-only claim extraction and well-studied multimodal tasks like image captioning or visual question answering. In this work, we present the first benchmark for multimodal claim extraction from social media, consisting of posts containing text and one or more images, annotated with gold-standard claims derived from real-world fact-checkers. We evaluate state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) under a three-part evaluation framework (semantic alignment, faithfulness, and decontextualization) and find that baseline MLLMs struggle to model rhetorical intent and contextual cues. To address this, we introduce MICE, an intent-aware framework which shows improvements in intent-critical cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个社交媒体多模态声明提取基准，并引入了MICE意图感知框架，以解决现有方法在处理结合文本和图像的社交媒体虚假信息时忽略多模态特性和修辞意图的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动事实核查方法主要依赖声明提取作为第一步，但大多忽视了当今虚假信息的多模态特性。社交媒体帖子通常结合简短、非正式的文本与图像（如表情包、截图和照片），这带来了与纯文本声明提取以及图像描述、视觉问答等多模态任务不同的挑战，目前缺乏专门针对多模态社交媒体声明提取的基准和有效方法。
AI.method: 本研究构建了首个社交媒体多模态声明提取基准，包含文本和图像的帖子，并标注了来自真实事实核查者的黄金标准声明。评估了最先进的多模态大语言模型在三部分评估框架下的表现，并提出了MICE意图感知框架来专门处理修辞意图和上下文线索的建模问题。
AI.result: 实验发现基线多模态大语言模型在建模修辞意图和上下文线索方面表现不佳，特别是在意图关键案例中。提出的MICE框架在意图关键案例中显示出改进效果，验证了意图感知方法在多模态声明提取任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了多模态社交媒体声明提取的独特挑战，特别是修辞意图建模的重要性。提出的基准和MICE框架为未来多模态事实核查研究提供了基础，表明需要专门设计的方法来处理社交媒体中文本和图像结合产生的复杂语义和意图表达。

title: Bridging Coarse and Fine Recognition: A Hybrid Approach for Open-Ended Multi-Granularity Object Recognition in Interactive Educational Games
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enabled open-ended object recognition, yet they struggle with fine-grained tasks. In contrast, CLIP-style models excel at fine-grained recognition but lack broad coverage of general object categories. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{HyMOR}, a \textbf{Hy}brid \textbf{M}ulti-granularity open-ended \textbf{O}bject \textbf{R}ecognition framework that integrates an MLLM with a CLIP model. In HyMOR, the MLLM performs open-ended and coarse-grained object recognition, while the CLIP model specializes in fine-grained identification of domain-specific objects such as animals and plants. This hybrid design enables accurate object understanding across multiple semantic granularities, serving as a robust perceptual foundation for downstream multi-modal content generation and interactive gameplay. To support evaluation in content-rich and educational scenarios, we introduce TBO (TextBook Objects), a dataset containing 20,942 images annotated with 8,816 object categories extracted from textbooks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HyMOR narrows the fine-grained recognition gap with CLIP to 0.2\% while improving general object recognition by 2.5\% over a baseline MLLM, measured by average Sentence-BERT (SBert) similarity. Overall, HyMOR achieves a 23.2\% improvement in average SBert across all evaluated datasets, highlighting its effectiveness in enabling accurate perception for multi-modal game content generation and interactive learning applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyMOR框架，通过集成多模态大语言模型与CLIP模型，解决了开放域物体识别中粗粒度与细粒度识别能力不平衡的问题，实现了多粒度物体感知的统一解决方案。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在开放域物体识别方面表现良好，但在细粒度识别任务上存在不足；而CLIP风格模型擅长细粒度识别但缺乏对通用物体类别的广泛覆盖。本研究旨在弥合这一差距，构建一个能够同时处理粗粒度和细粒度物体识别的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出HyMOR混合多粒度开放域物体识别框架，将多模态大语言模型与CLIP模型集成。其中MLLM负责开放域和粗粒度物体识别，CLIP模型专门处理动物、植物等特定领域的细粒度识别任务。同时引入TBO数据集，包含20,942张图像和8,816个从教科书中提取的物体类别，用于支持内容丰富的教育场景评估。
AI.result: 实验表明HyMOR将细粒度识别与CLIP的差距缩小至0.2%，同时将通用物体识别性能相比基线MLLM提升2.5%。在所有评估数据集上，平均Sentence-BERT相似度提升23.2%，显著改善了多粒度物体感知能力。
AI.conclusion: HyMOR框架成功实现了粗粒度与细粒度物体识别的有效融合，为下游多模态内容生成和交互式游戏提供了鲁棒的感知基础。该研究展示了混合架构在解决多粒度视觉识别问题上的潜力，特别适用于教育内容和游戏应用场景。

title: MNAFT: modality neuron-aware fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for image translation
comment: Accepted by SCIS (SCIENCE CHINA Information Science)
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown impressive capabilities, yet they often struggle to effectively capture the fine-grained textual information within images crucial for accurate image translation. This often leads to a modality gap between visual text inputs and textual inputs/outputs for image translation. Existing methods, primarily relying on instruction fine-tuning, risk parameter redundancy of pre-trained knowledge, hindering generalization performance. To address this, we introduce modality neuron-aware fine-tuning (MNAFT), a novel approach that takes advantage of the specialized roles of individual neurons within MLLMs for enhanced image translation. MNAFT identifies language-agnostic and language-specific neurons in both vision and language modules through an instruction-driven activation analysis, evaluating their importance in various translation tasks. We then perform selective fine-tuning, updating only the parameters of language-specific and language-agnostic neurons within the selected layers relevant to the target task, while preserving the knowledge encoded in other neurons and layers. Our extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that MNAFT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art image translation methods, including cascaded models, standard full fine-tuning, and parameter-efficient tuning techniques. Furthermore, we provide comprehensive analysis, including visualizations of neuron activations and clustering patterns, to offer insights into the roles of different neuron groups in mediating cross-modal understanding and facilitating accurate language-specific translation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了模态神经元感知微调（MNAFT），一种通过识别并选择性微调多模态大语言模型中语言特定和语言无关神经元来提升图像翻译性能的新方法，显著优于现有技术。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在图像翻译任务中难以有效捕捉图像内的细粒度文本信息，导致视觉文本输入与文本输入/输出之间存在模态鸿沟。现有方法主要依赖指令微调，但存在预训练知识参数冗余问题，限制了模型的泛化性能。
AI.method: 该方法提出模态神经元感知微调（MNAFT），通过指令驱动的激活分析识别视觉和语言模块中的语言无关神经元和语言特定神经元，评估它们在各种翻译任务中的重要性。然后进行选择性微调，仅更新与目标任务相关的选定层中的语言特定和语言无关神经元参数，同时保留其他神经元和层中编码的知识。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，MNAFT显著优于最先进的图像翻译方法，包括级联模型、标准全微调和参数高效调优技术。研究还提供了全面的分析，包括神经元激活和聚类模式的可视化，以揭示不同神经元组在介导跨模态理解和促进准确语言特定翻译中的作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了多模态大语言模型中神经元的功能特异性，证明了选择性神经元微调在保持预训练知识的同时提升图像翻译性能的有效性。MNAFT为理解跨模态表示和开发更高效的微调策略提供了新见解，具有重要的理论和实践意义。

title: Q-DeepSight: Incentivizing Thinking with Images for Image Quality Assessment and Refinement
summary: Image Quality Assessment (IQA) models are increasingly deployed as perceptual critics to guide generative models and image restoration. This role demands not only accurate scores but also actionable, localized feedback. However, current MLLM-based methods adopt a single-look, language-only paradigm, which departs from human evidence-seeking judgment and yields weakly grounded rationales, limiting their reliability for in-the-loop refinement. We propose Q-DeepSight, a think-with-image framework that emulates this human-like process. It performs interleaved Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (iMCoT) with tool-augmented evidence acquisition (e.g., crop-and-zoom) to explicitly determine where quality degrades and why. To train these long iMCoT trajectories via reinforcement learning, we introduce two techniques: Perceptual Curriculum Reward (PCR) to mitigate reward sparsity and Evidence Gradient Filtering (EGF) to improve credit assignment for visually-grounded reasoning. Q-DeepSight achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse benchmarks, including natural, restored, and AI-generated content. Furthermore, we demonstrate its practical value with Perceptual-in-Generation (PiG), a training-free framework where Q-DeepSight's diagnoses guide iterative image enhancement, effectively closing the loop between assessment and refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-DeepSight，一种模仿人类证据寻求过程的图像质量评估框架，通过交错多模态思维链和工具增强的证据获取来提供可操作的局部反馈，并在多种基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于MLLM的图像质量评估方法采用单次观察、纯语言范式，偏离了人类证据寻求的判断过程，产生弱基础的推理依据，限制了其在生成模型和图像修复中作为感知批评家的可靠性，无法提供可操作的局部反馈。
AI.method: 提出Q-DeepSight框架，采用交错多模态思维链进行思考，结合工具增强的证据获取机制（如裁剪和放大操作），通过强化学习训练这些长思维链轨迹，引入感知课程奖励缓解奖励稀疏性问题，以及证据梯度过滤改进视觉基础推理的信用分配。
AI.result: Q-DeepSight在包括自然图像、修复图像和AI生成内容在内的多样化基准测试中实现了最先进的性能表现，并通过感知引导生成框架展示了其实际应用价值，能够指导迭代图像增强，有效连接评估与精炼的闭环。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了模仿人类证据寻求过程的图像质量评估框架的有效性，不仅提升了评估准确性，还提供了可操作的诊断反馈，为生成模型和图像修复任务中的感知引导优化开辟了新途径，实现了评估与精炼的闭环整合。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection
summary: In recent years, multimodal multidomain fake news detection has garnered increasing attention. Nevertheless, this direction presents two significant challenges: (1) Failure to Capture Cross-Instance Narrative Consistency: existing models usually evaluate each news in isolation, fail to capture cross-instance narrative consistency, and thus struggle to address the spread of cluster based fake news driven by social media; (2) Lack of Domain Specific Knowledge for Reasoning: conventional models, which rely solely on knowledge encoded in their parameters during training, struggle to generalize to new or data-scarce domains (e.g., emerging events or niche topics). To tackle these challenges, we introduce Retrieval-Augmented Multimodal Model for Fake News Detection (RAMM). First, RAMM employs a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as its backbone to capture cross-modal semantic information from news samples. Second, RAMM incorporates an Abstract Narrative Alignment Module. This component adaptively extracts abstract narrative consistency from diverse instances across distinct domains, aggregates relevant knowledge, and thereby enables the modeling of high-level narrative information. Finally, RAMM introduces a Semantic Representation Alignment Module, which aligns the model's decision-making paradigm with that of humans - specifically, it shifts the model's reasoning process from direct inference on multimodal features to an instance-based analogical reasoning process. Extensive experimental results on three public datasets validate the efficacy of our proposed approach. Our code is available at the following link: https://github.com/li-yiheng/RAMM

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RAMM（检索增强多模态模型），用于解决多模态多领域假新闻检测中的跨实例叙事一致性建模和领域特定知识推理不足问题。该方法通过多模态大语言模型作为骨干，结合抽象叙事对齐和语义表示对齐模块，实现了基于实例的类比推理过程。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态多领域假新闻检测面临两个主要挑战：一是现有模型通常孤立评估每条新闻，无法捕捉跨实例的叙事一致性，难以应对社交媒体驱动的集群式假新闻传播；二是传统模型仅依赖训练时编码的参数知识，难以泛化到新领域或数据稀缺领域（如新兴事件或小众话题）。
AI.method: RAMM采用多模态大语言模型作为骨干网络以捕捉新闻样本的跨模态语义信息。模型包含抽象叙事对齐模块，能够自适应地从不同领域的多样化实例中提取抽象叙事一致性并聚合相关知识，从而建模高层次叙事信息。此外，模型引入语义表示对齐模块，将模型的决策范式与人类对齐，将推理过程从直接基于多模态特征的推断转变为基于实例的类比推理过程。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的广泛实验结果验证了所提方法的有效性。实验表明RAMM能够有效解决跨实例叙事一致性建模问题，并在新领域或数据稀缺场景下展现出良好的泛化能力，显著提升了多模态多领域假新闻检测的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过引入检索增强机制和叙事一致性建模，为多模态假新闻检测提供了新的解决方案。RAMM的实例类比推理范式不仅提高了模型性能，还使决策过程更接近人类认知方式，为处理社交媒体驱动的集群式虚假信息传播提供了有效工具，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: SIF: Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: The public accessibility of large vision-language models (LVLMs) raises serious concerns about unauthorized model reuse and intellectual property infringement. Existing ownership verification methods often rely on semantically abnormal queries or out-of-distribution responses as fingerprints, which can be easily detected and removed by adversaries. We expose this vulnerability through a Semantic Divergence Attack (SDA), which identifies and filters fingerprint queries by measuring semantic divergence between a suspect model and a reference model, showing that existing fingerprints are not semantic-preserving and are therefore easy to detect and bypass. To address these limitations, we propose SIF (Semantically In-Distribution Fingerprints), a non-intrusive ownership verification framework that requires no parameter modification. SIF introduces Semantic-Aligned Fingerprint Distillation (SAFD), which transfers text watermarking signals into the visual modality to produce semantically coherent yet fingerprinted responses. In addition, Robust-Fingerprint Optimization (RFO) enhances robustness by simulating worst-case representation perturbations, making the fingerprints resilient to model modifications such as fine-tuning and quantization. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-1.5 and Qwen2.5-VL demonstrate that SIF achieves strong stealthiness and robustness, providing a practical solution for LVLM copyright protection. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/SIF-VLM-Fingerprint

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大型视觉语言模型版权保护的新颖指纹框架SIF，通过语义对齐指纹蒸馏和鲁棒指纹优化技术，解决了现有所有权验证方法易被语义发散攻击检测和移除的脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型的公开可访问性引发了未经授权模型重用和知识产权侵权的严重担忧。现有所有权验证方法通常依赖语义异常查询或分布外响应作为指纹，这些指纹容易被攻击者通过语义发散攻击检测和移除，暴露了现有方法的脆弱性。
AI.method: 本文提出SIF框架，包含两个核心技术：语义对齐指纹蒸馏将文本水印信号转移到视觉模态，生成语义一致且带有指纹的响应；鲁棒指纹优化通过模拟最坏情况表示扰动增强鲁棒性，使指纹能够抵抗微调和量化等模型修改。该方法无需参数修改，实现了非侵入式所有权验证。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5和Qwen2.5-VL上的广泛实验表明，SIF实现了强大的隐蔽性和鲁棒性。该方法能够有效抵抗语义发散攻击，同时在模型微调、量化等修改后仍能保持指纹的可检测性，为LVLM版权保护提供了实用解决方案。
AI.conclusion: SIF框架通过语义对齐指纹和鲁棒优化技术，解决了现有模型指纹方法易被检测的脆弱性问题，为大型视觉语言模型的版权保护提供了更安全实用的验证机制。该研究揭示了语义一致性在模型指纹设计中的重要性，并为未来对抗性鲁棒指纹技术的发展指明了方向。

title: MM-JudgeBias: A Benchmark for Evaluating Compositional Biases in MLLM-as-a-Judge
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have been increasingly used as automatic evaluators-a paradigm known as MLLM-as-a-Judge. However, their reliability and vulnerabilities to biases remain underexplored. We find that many MLLM judges fail to reliably integrate key visual or textual cues, yielding unreliable evaluations when evidence is missing or mismatched, and exhibiting instability under semantically irrelevant perturbations. To address this, we systematically define Compositional Bias in MLLM-as-a-Judge systems and introduce MM-JudgeBias, a benchmark for evaluating it. MM-JudgeBias introduces controlled perturbations across Query, Image, and Response, and evaluates model behavior via two complementary metrics: Bias-Deviation (BD) for sensitivity and Bias-Conformity (BC) for stability. Our dataset of over 1,800 curated and refined multimodal samples, drawn from 29 source benchmarks, enables a fine-grained diagnosis of nine bias types across diverse tasks and domains. Experiments on 26 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveal systematic modality neglect and asymmetric evaluation tendencies, underscoring the need for more reliable judges.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统性地定义了多模态大语言模型作为评估器时的组合偏见问题，并提出了MM-JudgeBias基准来评估这种偏见，揭示了当前MLLM评估器在可靠性和稳定性方面的系统性缺陷。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型作为自动评估器的可靠性及其对偏见的脆弱性尚未得到充分探索，研究发现许多MLLM评估器无法可靠地整合关键视觉或文本线索，在证据缺失或不匹配时产生不可靠评估，并在语义无关扰动下表现出不稳定性。
AI.method: 研究系统性地定义了MLLM-as-a-Judge系统中的组合偏见，并引入了MM-JudgeBias基准进行评估，该基准通过对查询、图像和响应进行受控扰动，使用偏差偏差度和偏差一致性两个互补指标来评估模型行为，数据集包含从29个源基准中提取的1800多个精心策划的多模态样本。
AI.result: 对26个最先进的MLLM进行的实验揭示了系统性的模态忽视和不对称评估倾向，MM-JudgeBias基准能够对九种偏见类型在不同任务和领域中进行细粒度诊断，表明当前MLLM评估器在可靠整合多模态证据方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调了开发更可靠的MLLM评估器的迫切需求，提出的MM-JudgeBias基准为系统评估多模态评估偏见提供了标准化框架，揭示了当前模型在跨模态推理和评估稳定性方面的根本性挑战，为未来改进方向提供了重要见解。

title: OASIS: On-Demand Hierarchical Event Memory for Streaming Video Reasoning
summary: Streaming video reasoning requires models to operate in a setting where history grows without bound while meaningful evidence remains scarce. In such a landscape, relevant signal is like an oasis-small, critical, and easily lost in a desert of redundancy. Enlarging memory only widens the desert; aggressive compression dries up the oasis. The real difficulty lies in discovering where to look, not how much to remember. We therefore introduce OASIS, a novel framework for streaming video reasoning that tackles this challenge through structured, on-demand retrieval. It organizes streaming history into hierarchical events and performs reasoning as controlled refinement-short-context inference first, followed by semantically grounded retrieval only when uncertainty arises. As the retrieval is driven by high-level intent rather than embedding similarity, the retrieved memory is substantially more accurate and less noisy. Additionally, the mechanism is plug-and-play, training-free, and readily attaches to different streaming MLLM backbones. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and backbones show that OASIS achieves strong gains in long-horizon accuracy and compositional reasoning with bounded token cost and low request delay. Code is available at https://github.com/Solus-sano/OASIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OASIS框架，一种用于流式视频推理的新方法，通过结构化按需检索来解决长历史中的信息冗余问题，实现了在有限计算成本下的高效推理。
AI.motivation: 流式视频推理面临历史信息无限增长而关键证据稀缺的挑战，传统方法中扩大记忆会加剧冗余，而过度压缩又会丢失关键信号，核心困难在于如何准确定位而非记住多少内容。
AI.method: OASIS框架将流式历史组织为分层事件，采用控制式精化推理策略：先进行短上下文推理，仅在不确定性出现时执行基于语义的检索，该检索由高层意图驱动而非嵌入相似性，从而获得更准确、噪声更少的记忆。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和不同流式MLLM骨干网络上的实验表明，OASIS在长时程准确性和组合推理方面实现了显著提升，同时保持了有界令牌成本和低请求延迟，表现出优异的性能增益。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了基于意图驱动的结构化检索在流式视频推理中的有效性，提出的即插即用、无需训练的机制可灵活适配不同骨干网络，为处理长序列信息冗余问题提供了新思路。

title: Mitigating Multimodal Hallucination via Phase-wise Self-reward
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) still struggle with vision hallucination, where generated responses are inconsistent with the visual input. Existing methods either rely on large-scale annotated data for fine-tuning, which incurs massive computational overhead, or employ static post-hoc strategies that overlook the dynamic nature of hallucination emergence. To address these, we introduce a new self-rewarding framework, enabling dynamic hallucination mitigation at inference time without external supervision. On the empirical side, we reveal that visual hallucination exhibits phase-wise dynamic patterns, peaking at the onset of each semantic phase. Drawing on these insights, we propose \textbf{PSRD} (\textbf{Phase-wise \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{R}eward \textbf{D}ecoding) for online hallucination correction guided by phase-wise self-reward signals. To reduce the cost of repeated self-evaluation during decoding, we distill the hallucination guidance signal from LVLMs into a lightweight reward model. The reward model subsequently provides on-the-fly guidance for targeted intervention during the decoding process, enabling precise hallucination suppression. The proposed PSRD significantly reduces the hallucination rate of LLaVA-1.5-7B by 50.0% and consistently outperforms existing post-hoc methods across five hallucination evaluation benchmarks for four LVLMs. Further analysis confirms that PSRD effectively mitigates hallucination propagation and achieves a highly controllable trade-off between strong performance and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSRD（阶段性自奖励解码）框架，通过揭示视觉幻觉的阶段性动态模式，利用蒸馏的轻量级奖励模型在推理时提供实时指导，显著降低大型视觉语言模型的幻觉率，无需外部监督即可实现动态幻觉缓解。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）仍然面临视觉幻觉问题，即生成的响应与视觉输入不一致。现有方法要么依赖大规模标注数据进行微调，带来巨大计算开销，要么采用静态的事后策略，忽视了幻觉出现的动态特性。本研究旨在解决这些限制，实现无需外部监督的动态幻觉缓解。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的自奖励框架，可在推理时实现动态幻觉缓解。首先揭示了视觉幻觉呈现阶段性的动态模式，在每个语义阶段开始时达到峰值。基于此洞察，提出了PSRD（阶段性自奖励解码）方法，通过阶段性自奖励信号指导在线幻觉校正。为降低解码过程中重复自评估的成本，将幻觉指导信号从LVLMs蒸馏到轻量级奖励模型中，该奖励模型随后在解码过程中提供实时指导，实现精准的幻觉抑制。
AI.result: PSRD方法将LLaVA-1.5-7B的幻觉率显著降低了50.0%，并在五个幻觉评估基准测试中，对四种LVLMs一致优于现有的后处理方法。进一步分析证实，PSRD有效缓解了幻觉传播，并在强性能和推理效率之间实现了高度可控的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视觉幻觉的阶段性动态模式，并提出了一种无需外部监督的在线缓解框架。PSRD方法不仅显著降低了幻觉率，还通过轻量级奖励模型实现了高效的推理时干预，为LVLMs的幻觉问题提供了新的解决方案，平衡了性能与效率的权衡。

title: mEOL: Training-Free Instruction-Guided Multimodal Embedder for Vector Graphics and Image Retrieval
comment: Round 1 early acceptance to WACV 2026, Project page: https://scene-the-ella.github.io/meol
summary: Scalable Vector Graphics (SVGs) function both as visual images and as structured code that encode rich geometric and layout information, yet most methods rasterize them and discard this symbolic organization. At the same time, recent sentence embedding methods produce strong text representations but do not naturally extend to visual or structured modalities. We propose a training-free, instruction-guided multimodal embedding framework that uses a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) to map text, raster images, and SVG code into an aligned embedding space. We control the direction of embeddings through modality-specific instructions and structural SVG cues, eliminating the need for learned projection heads or contrastive training. Our method has two key components: (1) Multimodal Explicit One-word Limitation (mEOL), which instructs the MLLM to summarize any multimodal input into a single token whose hidden state serves as a compact semantic embedding. (2) A semantic SVG rewriting module that assigns meaningful identifiers and simplifies nested SVG elements through visual reasoning over the rendered image, exposing geometric and relational cues hidden in raw code. Using a repurposed VGBench, we build the first text-to-SVG retrieval benchmark and show that our training-free embeddings outperform encoder-based and training-based multimodal baselines. These results highlight prompt-level control as an effective alternative to parameter-level training for structure-aware multimodal retrieval. Project page: https://scene-the-ella.github.io/meol/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、基于指令引导的多模态嵌入框架，利用多模态大语言模型将文本、栅格图像和SVG代码映射到对齐的嵌入空间，通过模态特定指令和SVG结构线索实现结构感知的多模态检索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将可缩放矢量图形（SVG）栅格化处理，丢弃了其丰富的几何和布局信息等符号化组织结构，同时当前的句子嵌入方法虽然能生成强大的文本表示，但无法自然扩展到视觉或结构化模态，这造成了多模态表示对齐的空白。
AI.method: 该方法包含两个关键组件：多模态显式单字限制（mEOL）指导MLLM将任何多模态输入总结为单个令牌，其隐藏状态作为紧凑语义嵌入；语义SVG重写模块通过视觉推理为原始代码中的几何和关系线索分配有意义的标识符并简化嵌套SVG元素，无需学习投影头或对比训练。
AI.result: 通过重新利用VGBench构建了首个文本到SVG检索基准，实验表明这种无需训练的嵌入方法在性能上超越了基于编码器的和需要训练的多模态基线方法，验证了提示级控制作为参数级训练有效替代方案的结构感知检索能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了提示级控制是参数级训练的有效替代方案，能够实现结构感知的多模态检索，为利用大语言模型处理结构化视觉内容开辟了新途径，同时提出的语义SVG重写技术为处理复杂嵌套图形元素提供了实用解决方案。

title: DREAM: Dynamic Retinal Enhancement with Adaptive Multi-modal Fusion for Expert Precision Medical Report Generation
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society Annual International Conference (Proceedings of the 48th International Conference), 2026
summary: Automating medical reports for retinal images requires a sophisticated blend of visual pattern recognition and deep clinical knowledge. Current Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often struggle in specialized medical fields where data is scarce, leading to models that overfit and miss subtle but critical pathologies. To address this, we introduce DREAM (Dynamic Retinal Enhancement with Adaptive Multi-modal Fusion), a novel framework for high-fidelity medical report generation that excels even with limited data. DREAM employs a unique two-stage fusion mechanism that intelligently integrates visual data with clinical keywords curated by ophthalmologists. First, the Abstractor module maps image and keyword features into a shared space, enhancing visual data with pathology-relevant insights. Next, the Adaptor performs adaptive multi-modal fusion, dynamically weighting the importance of each modality using learnable parameters to create a unified representation. To ensure the model's outputs are semantically grounded in clinical reality, a Contrastive Alignment module aligns these fused representations with ground-truth medical reports during training. By combining medical expertise with an efficient fusion strategy, DREAM sets a new state-of-the-art on the DeepEyeNet benchmark, achieving a BLEU-4 score of 0.241, and further demonstrates strong generalization to the ROCO dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DREAM框架，一种用于视网膜图像医学报告生成的动态增强自适应多模态融合方法，通过结合视觉数据和临床关键词来解决专业医疗领域中数据稀缺的问题，在DeepEyeNet基准测试中取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前大型视觉语言模型在数据稀缺的专业医疗领域（如视网膜图像分析）中表现不佳，容易过拟合并忽略细微但关键的病理特征，这限制了自动化医学报告生成的准确性和可靠性。
AI.method: DREAM框架采用独特的两阶段融合机制：Abstractor模块将图像和眼科医生整理的临床关键词特征映射到共享空间，增强视觉数据的病理相关性；Adaptor模块通过可学习参数动态加权各模态重要性，实现自适应多模态融合；Contrastive Alignment模块在训练过程中对齐融合表示与真实医学报告，确保语义临床基础。
AI.result: DREAM在DeepEyeNet基准测试中取得了新的最先进性能，BLEU-4得分达到0.241，并在ROCO数据集上表现出强大的泛化能力，证明了其在有限数据条件下生成高保真医学报告的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过将医学专业知识与高效的多模态融合策略相结合，可以在数据稀缺的专业医疗领域实现高质量的自动化报告生成，为医疗AI应用提供了新的框架设计思路，并展示了临床知识引导的模型增强在提升诊断准确性和语义相关性方面的价值。

title: EvoComp: Learning Visual Token Compression for Multimodal Large Language Models via Semantic-Guided Evolutionary Labeling
summary: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on vision-language understanding tasks, yet their inference efficiency is often hampered by the large number of visual tokens, particularly in high-resolution or multi-image scenarios. To address this issue, we propose EvoComp, a visual token compression framework that significantly reduces token count while preserving task accuracy. EvoComp introduces a lightweight encoder-only transformer-based compressor that selects the most informative and non-redundant visual tokens by jointly considering visual and textual contexts. A core challenge lies in providing effective supervision for training the compressor. To this end, we design an evolutionary labeling strategy that searches for token subsets minimizing the MLLM's output loss, while enforcing semantic diversity through vocabulary-based token grouping. We further train the compressor using a tailored loss function combining the GHM loss to mitigate class and difficulty imbalance, and a cosine similarity regularization to encourage semantic separation between retained and discarded tokens. Extensive experiments across multiple vision-language benchmarks show that EvoComp outperforms existing methods based on attention or similarity heuristics. Notably, it retains 99.3% of the original accuracy under 3x token compression and delivers up to 1.6x speedup on mobile devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoComp，一种用于多模态大语言模型的视觉令牌压缩框架，通过进化标注策略选择最具信息量的视觉令牌，在显著减少令牌数量的同时保持任务准确性，实现了高效的视觉语言推理。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在视觉语言理解任务中表现出色，但其推理效率受到大量视觉令牌的制约，特别是在高分辨率或多图像场景下，现有基于注意力或相似性启发式的方法压缩效果有限，需要更有效的令牌压缩方法来平衡效率与准确性。
AI.method: EvoComp采用轻量级仅编码器Transformer压缩器，通过联合考虑视觉和文本上下文选择最具信息量且非冗余的视觉令牌；核心创新是进化标注策略，通过搜索最小化MLLM输出损失的令牌子集并提供监督信号，同时使用基于词汇表的令牌分组确保语义多样性；训练时结合GHM损失缓解类别和难度不平衡，并采用余弦相似度正则化促进保留与丢弃令牌间的语义分离。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言基准测试中，EvoComp优于基于注意力或相似性启发式的现有方法；在3倍令牌压缩下保持原始准确率的99.3%，在移动设备上实现高达1.6倍的加速，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的推理效率。
AI.conclusion: EvoComp通过进化标注策略和精心设计的损失函数，有效解决了视觉令牌压缩中的监督信号难题，为多模态大语言模型的高效部署提供了实用解决方案；该方法在保持准确性的同时显著提升推理速度，特别适用于资源受限的移动设备和高分辨率视觉理解场景。

title: Enhancing Zero-shot Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment with Profile-aware Multimodal LLM
summary: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) aims to predict an individual user's subjective rating of an image, which requires modeling user-specific aesthetic preferences. Existing methods rely on historical user ratings for this modeling and therefore struggle when such data are unavailable. We address this zero-shot setting by using user profiles as contextual signals for personalization and adopting a profile-based personalization paradigm. We introduce P-MLLM, a profile-aware multimodal LLM that augments a frozen LLM with selective fusion modules for controlled visual integration. These modules selectively integrate visual information into the model's evolving hidden states during profile-conditioned reasoning, allowing visual information to be incorporated in a profile-aware manner. Experiments on recent PIAA benchmarks show that P-MLLM achieves competitive zero-shot performance and remains effective even with coarse profile information, highlighting the potential of profile-based personalization for zero-shot PIAA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出P-MLLM，一种基于用户画像的多模态大语言模型，用于解决零样本个性化图像美学评估问题，通过选择性融合模块实现画像感知的视觉信息整合。
AI.motivation: 个性化图像美学评估通常依赖用户历史评分数据来建模用户特定审美偏好，但在零样本场景下当此类数据不可用时现有方法面临困难，本研究旨在通过利用用户画像作为上下文信号来解决这一零样本设置问题。
AI.method: 本文提出P-MLLM模型，采用基于画像的个性化范式，在冻结的大语言模型基础上引入选择性融合模块进行可控视觉整合，这些模块在画像条件推理过程中选择性地将视觉信息整合到模型演化的隐藏状态中，实现画像感知的视觉信息融合。
AI.result: 在近期PIAA基准测试上的实验表明，P-MLLM在零样本设置下取得了有竞争力的性能表现，即使在粗粒度画像信息下仍保持有效性，验证了基于画像的个性化方法在零样本PIAA任务中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了用户画像作为上下文信号在零样本个性化美学评估中的有效性，提出的选择性融合机制为多模态个性化建模提供了新思路，为缺乏历史评分数据的个性化应用场景提供了可行解决方案。

title: LookasideVLN: Direction-Aware Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation (Aerial VLN) enables unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to follow natural language instructions and navigate complex urban environments. While recent advances have achieved progress through large-scale memory graphs and lookahead path planning, they remain limited by shallow instruction understanding and high computational cost. In particular, existing methods rely primarily on landmark descriptions, overlooking directional cues "a key source of spatial context in human navigation". In this work, we propose LookasideVLN, a new paradigm that exploits directional cues in natural language to achieve both more accurate spatial reasoning and greater computational efficiency. LookasideVLN comprises three core components: (1) an Egocentric Lookaside Graph (ELG) that dynamically encodes instruction-relevant landmarks and their directional relationships, (2) a Spatial Landmark Knowledge Base (SLKB) that provides lightweight memory retrieval from prior navigation experiences, and (3) a Lookaside MLLM Navigation Agent that aligns multimodal information from user instructions, visual observations, and landmark-direction information from ELG for path planning. Extensive experiments show that LookasideVLN significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art CityNavAgent, even with a single-level lookahead, demonstrating that leveraging directional cues is a powerful yet efficient strategy for Aerial VLN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LookasideVLN，一种利用自然语言中方向线索进行空中视觉语言导航的新范式，通过动态编码地标方向关系和轻量级记忆检索，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升导航精度。
AI.motivation: 现有空中视觉语言导航方法主要依赖地标描述，忽视了方向线索这一人类导航中的关键空间上下文信息，导致指令理解浅层且计算成本高昂，限制了在复杂城市环境中的导航性能。
AI.method: LookasideVLN包含三个核心组件：以自我为中心的旁视图动态编码指令相关地标及其方向关系，空间地标知识库提供轻量级历史导航经验检索，以及旁视多模态大语言模型导航代理对齐用户指令、视觉观察和ELG中的地标方向信息进行路径规划。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，LookasideVLN在仅使用单层前瞻的情况下显著优于最先进的CityNavAgent，证明利用方向线索是实现高效且准确空中视觉语言导航的有效策略。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，充分利用自然语言中的方向线索而非仅依赖地标描述，能够实现更准确的空间推理和更高的计算效率，为空中视觉语言导航提供了新的研究方向，即通过细粒度方向关系建模来提升导航系统的性能和实用性。

title: Instinct vs. Reflection: Unifying Token and Verbalized Confidence in Multimodal Large Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in various perception and reasoning tasks. Despite this success, ensuring their reliability in practical deployment necessitates robust confidence estimation. Prior works have predominantly focused on text-only LLMs, often relying on computationally expensive self-consistency sampling. In this paper, we extend this to multimodal settings and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs' response confidence estimation. Our analysis reveals a significant instinct-reflection misalignment: the model's implicit token-level support frequently diverges from its verbal self-assessment confidence. To address this misalignment, we propose a monotone confidence fusion framework to merge dual-channel signals and cross-channel consistency to estimate correctness. Subsequently, an order-preserving mean alignment step is applied to correct global bias, which improves calibration while preserving the risk-coverage trade-off for selective prediction. Experiments on diverse open-source and closed-source MLLMs show that our method consistently yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves both calibration and failure prediction. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/Instinct-vs.-Reflection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多模态大语言模型的单调置信度融合框架，通过整合双通道信号和跨通道一致性来估计响应正确性，解决了本能-反思错位问题，显著提升了置信度估计的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在各种感知和推理任务中表现出色，但确保其在实际部署中的可靠性需要稳健的置信度估计。先前研究主要关注纯文本大语言模型，通常依赖计算成本高昂的自一致性采样，而多模态设置下的置信度估计研究不足，且存在模型隐式标记级支持与其口头自我评估置信度之间的显著错位问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种单调置信度融合框架，通过整合双通道信号（本能通道和反思通道）和跨通道一致性来估计响应正确性。该方法首先合并双通道信号，然后应用保序均值对齐步骤来校正全局偏差，在保持选择性预测的风险覆盖权衡的同时改善校准性能。
AI.result: 在多种开源和闭源多模态大语言模型上的实验表明，该方法能持续产生更可靠的置信度估计，显著改善了校准性能和失败预测能力。具体而言，该方法在保持风险覆盖权衡的同时，有效解决了本能-反思错位问题，提升了置信度估计的整体可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了多模态大语言模型中存在的本能-反思错位现象，并提出了一种有效的单调置信度融合框架来解决这一问题。该方法不仅改善了置信度估计的可靠性，还为多模态大语言模型的实际部署提供了更稳健的置信度校准方案，对未来多模态系统的可靠性评估具有重要指导意义。

title: PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation
comment: 19 pages, 12 figures, Accepted by CVPR Findings 2026
summary: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination in hematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissue pathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than tissue architecture, making it distinct in both visual characteristics and diagnostic reasoning. However, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for pathology are primarily developed on solid-tissue WSIs and struggle to generalize to PBS. To bridge this gap, we construct PBSInstr, the first vision-language dataset for PBS interpretation, comprising 353 PBS WSIs paired with microscopic impression paragraphs and 29k cell-level image crops annotated with cell type labels and morphological descriptions. To facilitate instruction tuning, PBSInstr further includes 27k question-answer (QA) pairs for cell crops and 1,286 QA pairs for PBS slides. Building upon PBSInstr, we develop PBS-VL, a hematopathology-tailored vision-language model for multi-level PBS interpretation at both cell and slide levels. To comprehensively evaluate PBS understanding, we construct PBSBench, a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark featuring four question categories and six PBS interpretation tasks. Experiments show that PBS-VL outperforms existing general-purpose and pathology MLLMs, underscoring the value of PBS-specific data. We release our code, datasets, and model weights to facilitate future research. Our proposed framework lays the foundation for developing practical AI assistants supporting decision-making in hematopathology.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了首个用于外周血涂片（PBS）解释的视觉语言数据集PBSInstr，并开发了针对血液病理学的多级视觉语言模型PBS-VL，显著提升了PBS细胞和玻片层面的解释性能，超越了现有通用和病理学MLLMs。
AI.motivation: 当前用于病理学的多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）主要基于实体组织全玻片图像（WSIs）开发，难以泛化到外周血涂片（PBS）解释，因为PBS关注单个细胞形态而非组织结构，在视觉特征和诊断推理上具有独特性，这构成了现有方法的显著局限性。
AI.method: 研究首先构建了PBSInstr数据集，包含353个PBS全玻片图像配对的显微镜印象段落、29k个细胞级图像裁剪标注细胞类型和形态描述，以及27k个细胞级和1,286个玻片级问答对；基于此开发了PBS-VL模型，专门用于细胞和玻片层面的多级PBS解释；同时建立了PBSBench视觉问答基准，涵盖四个问题类别和六个PBS解释任务。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PBS-VL在PBS理解任务上显著优于现有的通用病理学MLLMs和专门化模型，验证了PBS特定数据的价值；模型在细胞类型识别、形态描述和玻片级解释等多个任务上均表现出色，为血液病理学AI辅助决策提供了可靠基础。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了血液病理学AI辅助诊断的关键空白，提出的框架为开发实用的血液病理学AI助手奠定了基础；释放的代码、数据集和模型权重将促进未来研究，强调了领域特定数据在专业医学图像分析中的重要性。

title: RemoteShield: Enable Robust Multimodal Large Language Models for Earth Observation
summary: A robust Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for Earth Observation should maintain consistent interpretation and reasoning under realistic input variations. However, current Remote Sensing MLLMs fail to meet this requirement. Trained on carefully curated clean datasets, they learn brittle mappings that do not generalize to noisy conditions in operational Earth Observation. Consequently, their performance degrades when confronted with imperfect inputs in deployment. To quantify this vulnerability, we construct a realistic set of multimodal perturbations, including visual degradations such as cloud and fog cover, together with diverse human-centric textual variations ranging from colloquialisms to vague or omitted instructions. Empirical evaluations show that these perturbations significantly impair the visual-semantic reasoning capabilities of leading RS foundation models. To address this limitation, we introduce RemoteShield, a robust Remote Sensing MLLM trained to maintain consistent outputs across realistic input variations. During training, each clean sample is paired with its image-text perturbed variants to form a semantic equivalence cluster. Rather than directly fitting noisy samples, RemoteShield is optimized through preference learning over clean and perturbed conditions within the same cluster. By comparing model responses to clean and corrupted inputs, the model is encouraged to favor stable responses over perturbation-induced failures. This cross-condition alignment helps the model focus on underlying task semantics despite visual degradations and textual noise. Experiments on three Earth Observation tasks show that RemoteShield consistently delivers stronger robustness and cross-condition consistency than representative baselines under realistic multimodal perturbations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RemoteShield，一种针对地球观测任务的鲁棒多模态大语言模型，通过偏好学习在语义等价簇中保持对清洁与扰动输入的一致性响应，显著提升了模型在现实噪声条件下的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 当前遥感多模态大语言模型在精心策划的清洁数据集上训练，学习到的脆弱映射无法泛化到实际地球观测中的噪声条件，导致在面对不完美输入时性能显著下降。现有模型缺乏对现实多模态扰动（包括云层、雾霾等视觉退化以及口语化、模糊或省略指令等文本变异）的鲁棒性，这限制了其在操作环境中的可靠应用。
AI.method: 作者构建了包含视觉退化和人类中心文本变异的现实多模态扰动集，并提出了RemoteShield模型。该模型通过将每个清洁样本与其图像-文本扰动变体配对形成语义等价簇，采用偏好学习优化清洁与扰动条件之间的响应一致性。通过比较模型对清洁和损坏输入的响应，鼓励模型偏好稳定响应而非扰动诱导的失败，实现跨条件对齐以关注底层任务语义。
AI.result: 实验评估表明，现实多模态扰动显著损害了领先遥感基础模型的视觉语义推理能力。在三个地球观测任务上的实验显示，RemoteShield在现实多模态扰动下比代表性基线模型表现出更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性，验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过语义等价簇中的偏好学习实现跨条件对齐，可以有效提升遥感多模态大语言模型对现实输入变异的鲁棒性。这一方法使模型能够专注于底层任务语义而非表面扰动，为构建适用于操作环境的可靠地球观测系统提供了重要技术路径，并强调了在模型训练中纳入现实噪声条件的重要性。

title: EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations
summary: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EVE框架，一种通过可执行视觉变换实现多模态大语言模型自我进化的新方法，完全绕过伪标签依赖，利用动态生成且复杂度递增的视觉变换代码来创建具有绝对真实答案的视觉问答问题。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型的自我进化面临关键挑战：基于伪标签的方法因模型预测漂移而导致质量逐渐退化，而基于模板的方法局限于静态变换集合，无法在难度和多样性上自适应。研究认为，稳健的持续自我改进不仅需要独立于模型内部确定性的确定性外部反馈，还需要一种机制来持续多样化训练分布。
AI.method: EVE采用挑战者-求解者双策略架构，挑战者维护并逐步扩展视觉变换代码示例队列，从中合成新颖的Python脚本来执行动态视觉变换。执行这些脚本产生具有绝对、执行验证的真实答案的视觉问答问题，完全消除了对模型生成监督的依赖。多维奖励系统整合语义多样性和动态难度校准，引导挑战者丰富其代码示例队列，同时提出逐渐更具挑战性的任务。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，EVE在性能上持续超越现有的自我进化方法，为可验证的多模态大语言模型自我进化建立了稳健且可扩展的范式。该方法避免了模式崩溃，并促进了两个策略之间的相互协同进化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为多模态大语言模型的自我进化提供了一个新颖且有效的框架，通过可执行视觉变换和双策略架构实现了无需伪标签的持续改进。这种方法不仅解决了现有方法的局限性，还为未来模型自我进化研究提供了新的方向，特别是在确保训练数据质量和多样性方面具有重要启示。

title: PestVL-Net: Enabling Multimodal Pest Learning via Fine-grained Vision-Language Interaction
summary: Effective pest recognition and management are crucial for sustainable agricultural development. However, collecting pest data in real scenarios is often challenging. Compared to other domains, pests exhibit a wide variety of species with complex and diverse morphological characteristics. Existing techniques struggle to effectively model the key visual and high-level semantic features of pests in a fine-grained manner. These limitations hinder the practical application of such methods in real agricultural scenarios. To address these critical challenges, we present a synergistic approach that integrates PestVL-Net, a novel vision-language framework, with two multi-species pest datasets to facilitate fine-grained pest learning. The visual pathway of PestVL-Net utilizes the Recurrent Weighted Key Value (RWKV) architecture, incorporating a saliency-guided adaptive window partitioning scheme to effectively model the fine-grained visual characteristics of pests. Concurrently, the linguistic component generates precise pest semantic descriptions by leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) priors, critically informed by agricultural expert knowledge and structured via multimodal Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning. The deep fusion of these complementary visual and textual representations enables fine-grained multimodal pest learning. Extensive experimental evaluations on multiple pest datasets validate the superior performance of PestVL-Net, highlighting its potential for effective real-world pest management.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PestVL-Net，一种新颖的视觉-语言框架，通过融合细粒度视觉特征和语义描述来解决害虫识别中的关键挑战，实现了卓越的害虫识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中害虫数据收集困难，害虫物种繁多且形态特征复杂多样，现有技术难以有效建模害虫的细粒度视觉特征和高层语义信息，这阻碍了相关方法在真实农业场景中的实际应用。
AI.method: 提出PestVL-Net视觉-语言框架，视觉通路采用RWKV架构并引入显著性引导的自适应窗口划分方案来建模害虫细粒度视觉特征，语言组件利用多模态大语言模型先验生成精确的害虫语义描述，并通过多模态链式推理进行结构化，实现视觉和文本表示的深度融合。
AI.result: 在多个害虫数据集上的广泛实验评估验证了PestVL-Net的优越性能，表明该方法在细粒度害虫学习方面具有显著优势，为有效的现实世界害虫管理提供了潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过整合视觉和语言模态的互补信息，实现了细粒度多模态害虫学习，为解决农业害虫识别中的关键挑战提供了创新解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: SpatialImaginer: Towards Adaptive Visual Imagination for Spatial Reasoning
summary: Spatial intelligence, which refers to the ability to reason about geometric and physical structure from visual observations, remains a core challenge for multimodal large language models. Despite promising performance, recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often exhibit fragile reasoning traces in spatial intelligence tasks that involve consistent spatial state recognition. We argue that these failures stem from a mismatch between the spatial recognition mechanism and the text-only reasoning behavior of these MLLMs. Effective spatial reasoning requires low-level geometric structure to be faithfully preserved and updated throughout the reasoning process, whereas textual representations tend to abstract away precisely these critical details. To address this issue, we propose SpatialImaginer, a unified multimodal generation framework that integrates textual reasoning with visual imagination. Our framework adopts a divide-and-conquer strategy, using text chain-of-thought for high-level semantic planning and the visual imagination for geometry-sensitive state transformation and consistency preservation. To support this capability, we further introduce a difficulty-aware data engine with closed-loop verification to train the model to invoke visual imagination selectively when stable spatial state tracking is required. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial intelligence benchmarks show that SpatialImaginer achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially improves robustness on complex multi-step spatial reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpatialImaginer，一种统一的多模态生成框架，通过将文本推理与视觉想象相结合来解决多模态大语言模型在空间智能任务中的脆弱推理问题。该框架采用分而治之策略，在多样化空间智能基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在涉及一致空间状态识别的空间智能任务中表现出脆弱的推理轨迹，这种失败源于空间识别机制与纯文本推理行为之间的不匹配。有效的空间推理需要在推理过程中忠实保留和更新低级几何结构，而文本表示往往会抽象掉这些关键细节。
AI.method: 本文提出SpatialImaginer统一多模态生成框架，集成文本推理与视觉想象，采用分而治之策略：使用文本思维链进行高级语义规划，利用视觉想象进行几何敏感的状态转换和一致性保持。进一步引入具有闭环验证的难度感知数据引擎，训练模型在需要稳定空间状态跟踪时选择性调用视觉想象。
AI.result: 在多样化空间智能基准测试上的广泛实验表明，SpatialImaginer实现了最先进的性能，并在复杂多步空间推理任务上显著提高了鲁棒性。该框架在保持空间状态一致性和几何结构准确性方面表现出显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明，通过将文本推理与视觉想象相结合，可以有效解决多模态大语言模型在空间智能任务中的根本局限性。这种统一框架为增强模型的空间推理能力提供了新方向，特别是在需要几何结构保持和状态一致性的复杂场景中具有重要应用价值。

title: Where to Focus: Query-Modulated Multimodal Keyframe Selection for Long Video Understanding
summary: Long video understanding remains a formidable challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to the prohibitive computational cost of processing dense frame sequences. Prevailing solutions, which select a keyframe subset, typically rely on either a single visual-centric metric (e.g., CLIP similarity) or a static fusion of heuristic scores. This ``one-size-fits-all'' paradigm frequently fails: visual-only metrics are ineffective for plot-driven narrative queries, while indiscriminately incorporating textual scores introduces severe ``modal noise'' for purely visual tasks. To break this bottleneck, we propose Q-Gate, a plug-and-play and training-free framework that treats keyframe selection as a dynamic modality routing problem. We decouple the retrieval process into three lightweight expert streams: Visual Grounding for local details, Global Matching for scene semantics, and Contextual Alignment for subtitle-driven narratives. Crucially, Q-Gate introduces a Query-Modulated Gating Mechanism that leverages the in-context reasoning of an LLM to assess the query's intent and dynamically allocate attention weights across the experts. This mechanism intelligently activates necessary modalities while ``muting'' irrelevant ones, thereby maximizing the signal-to-noise ratio. Extensive experiments on LongVideoBench and Video-MME across multiple MLLM backbones demonstrate that Q-Gate substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. By effectively suppressing modality-specific noise, it provides a robust, highly interpretable solution for scalable video reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Q-Gate，一种即插即用且无需训练的动态模态路由框架，通过查询调制门控机制智能激活视频关键帧选择中的必要模态并抑制无关模态噪声，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的长视频理解能力。
AI.motivation: 长视频理解对多模态大语言模型构成严峻挑战，因为处理密集帧序列的计算成本过高。现有基于关键帧子集选择的方法通常依赖单一视觉中心度量或静态融合启发式分数，这种"一刀切"范式经常失效：仅视觉度量对情节驱动的叙事查询无效，而无差别纳入文本分数会为纯视觉任务引入严重的"模态噪声"。
AI.method: Q-Gate将关键帧选择视为动态模态路由问题，解耦为三个轻量级专家流：用于局部细节的视觉定位、用于场景语义的全局匹配以及用于字幕驱动叙事的上下文对齐。关键创新是查询调制门控机制，利用LLM的上下文推理能力评估查询意图，并动态分配专家间的注意力权重，智能激活必要模态同时"静音"无关模态，最大化信噪比。
AI.result: 在LongVideoBench和Video-MME基准测试中，Q-Gate在多个MLLM骨干网络上大幅优于最先进的基线方法。通过有效抑制模态特定噪声，该框架为可扩展视频推理提供了稳健且高度可解释的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: Q-Gate通过动态模态路由打破了长视频理解的瓶颈，其查询调制门控机制能够根据查询意图自适应地激活相关模态专家，为多模态视频理解提供了新的范式。该框架的即插即用特性使其易于部署，无需额外训练的特点降低了应用门槛，为大规模视频内容分析开辟了新的可能性。

title: AeroRAG: Structured Multimodal Retrieval-Augmented LLM for Fine-Grained Aerial Visual Reasoning
summary: Despite recent progress in multimodal large language models (MLLMs), reliable visual question answering in aerial scenes remains challenging. In such scenes, task-critical evidence is often carried by small objects, explicit quantities, coarse locations, and inter-object relations, whereas conventional dense visual-token representations are not well aligned with these structured semantics. To address this interface mismatch, we propose AeroRAG, a scene-graph-guided multimodal retrieval-augmented generation framework for visual question answering. The framework first converts an input image into structured visual knowledge, including object categories, quantities, spatial locations, and semantic relations, and then retrieves query-relevant semantic chunks to construct compact prompts for a text-based large language model. Rather than relying on direct reasoning over dense visual tokens, our method introduces a more explicit intermediate interface between perception and language reasoning. Experiments on the AUG aerial dataset and the general-domain VG-150 benchmark show consistent improvements over six strong MLLM baselines, with the largest gains observed in dense aerial scenes and relation-sensitive reasoning. We further evaluate the framework on VQAv2 to verify that the proposed interface remains compatible with standard visual reasoning settings. These results suggest that structured retrieval is a practical design direction for deployment-oriented and grounded visual reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AeroRAG，一种基于场景图引导的多模态检索增强生成框架，用于解决航空场景中视觉问答的挑战。该框架通过将图像转换为结构化视觉知识并检索相关语义块，为基于文本的大语言模型构建紧凑提示，从而在感知和语言推理之间建立更明确的中间接口。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型取得进展，但航空场景中的可靠视觉问答仍面临挑战。在这些场景中，任务关键证据通常由小物体、明确数量、粗略位置和对象间关系承载，而传统的密集视觉标记表示与这些结构化语义不对齐，存在接口不匹配问题。
AI.method: 本文提出AeroRAG框架，首先将输入图像转换为结构化视觉知识，包括对象类别、数量、空间位置和语义关系，然后检索查询相关的语义块，为基于文本的大语言模型构建紧凑提示。该方法在感知和语言推理之间引入了更明确的中间接口，而非依赖直接对密集视觉标记进行推理。
AI.result: 在AUG航空数据集和通用领域VG-150基准测试中，该方法相对于六个强大的MLLM基线模型表现出一致的改进，在密集航空场景和关系敏感推理中观察到最大增益。在VQAv2上的进一步评估验证了所提出的接口与标准视觉推理设置保持兼容。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果表明结构化检索是面向部署和基于基础的视觉推理系统的实用设计方向。该方法通过明确的中间接口解决了感知和语言推理之间的对齐问题，为复杂场景中的可靠视觉问答提供了有效解决方案。

title: S2H-DPO: Hardness-Aware Preference Optimization for Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable progress in single-image understanding, yet effective reasoning across multiple images remains challenging. We identify a critical capability gap in existing multi-image alignment approaches: current methods focus primarily on localized reasoning with pre-specified image indices (``Look at Image 3 and...''), bypassing the essential skills of global visual search and autonomous cross-image comparison. To address this limitation, we introduce a Simple-to-Hard (S2H) learning framework that systematically constructs multi-image preference data across three hierarchical reasoning levels requiring an increasing level of capabilities: (1) single-image localized reasoning, (2) multi-image localized comparison, and (3) global visual search. Unlike prior work that relies on model-specific attributes, such as hallucinations or attention heuristics, to generate preference pairs, our approach leverages prompt-driven complexity to create chosen/rejected pairs that are applicable across different models. Through extensive evaluations on LLaVA and Qwen-VL models, we show that our diverse multi-image reasoning data significantly enhances multi-image reasoning performance, yielding significant improvements over baseline methods across benchmarks. Importantly, our approach maintains strong single-image reasoning performance while simultaneously strengthening multi-image understanding capabilities, thus advancing the state of the art for holistic visual preference alignment.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个简单到困难（S2H）学习框架，通过构建分层多图像偏好数据来解决现有视觉语言模型在多图像推理中的能力差距，显著提升了多图像理解性能，同时保持了单图像推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在单图像理解方面取得了显著进展，但在多图像推理方面存在关键能力差距。当前方法主要局限于使用预定义图像索引的局部推理，而缺乏全局视觉搜索和自主跨图像比较的基本能力，这限制了模型在多图像场景中的有效推理。
AI.method: 研究引入了简单到困难（S2H）学习框架，系统构建了三个层次推理级别的多图像偏好数据：单图像局部推理、多图像局部比较和全局视觉搜索。该方法利用提示驱动的复杂性来创建适用于不同模型的偏好对，而不依赖模型特定属性如幻觉或注意力启发式。
AI.result: 在LLaVA和Qwen-VL模型上的广泛评估表明，多样化的多图像推理数据显著提升了多图像推理性能，在多个基准测试中相比基线方法取得了显著改进。重要的是，该方法在保持强大单图像推理性能的同时，增强了多图像理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过分层偏好对齐方法推进了多图像推理的技术水平，为视觉语言模型提供了更全面的视觉偏好对齐能力。框架的模型无关特性使其能够广泛应用于不同架构，为构建更强大的多模态推理系统提供了有效途径。
